notes: Primary key; decimal(10,0) has no fractional part and fits within INT64 range (max 10 digits)
varchar(50) maps to BigQuery STRING; length constraint is not enforced at the BigQuery layer
varchar(100) maps to BigQuery STRING; consider adding a downstream uniqueness check for email
Nullable varchar(20) maps to nullable BigQuery STRING; phone numbers stored as text to preserve formatting
MySQL DATE maps directly to BigQuery DATE; chosen as partition column (DAY granularity) to enable efficient hire-cohort and time-range analytics
varchar(20) maps to BigQuery STRING; used as cluster column (position 2) to accelerate job-role filtering
decimal(8,2) maps to BigQuery NUMERIC (29 digits, 9 decimal places); precision fully preserved for financial calculations
Nullable decimal(4,2) maps to nullable BigQuery NUMERIC; represents commission rate (e.g. 0.15 = 15%)
Nullable self-referencing FK to employee_id; decimal(10,0) cast to INT64; NULL indicates a top-level employee with no manager
Nullable decimal(4,0) maps to INT64; used as cluster column (position 1) to accelerate department-level filtering and aggregations
varchar(10) maps to BigQuery STRING; low-cardinality column used as cluster column (position 3) to prune scans by employee status
MySQL TIMESTAMP maps to BigQuery TIMESTAMP (UTC); represents the original source record creation time
Nullable MySQL TIMESTAMP maps to nullable BigQuery TIMESTAMP; used for watermark-based incremental extraction in hourly pipeline runs
